llm.pre_prompt: You are a support agent assistant. Analyze the following session data to understand the user's issue.
llm.post_prompt: Based on the session, identify the primary user goal, any errors encountered, and the steps leading to the final critical issue. List any help documentation pages visited.

primary_goal.description: A summary of the user's main objective during the session.

issues_encountered.description: A list of problems or errors the user faced.

items.description: A description of a single issue.

final_action.description: The last significant action the user took before the session ended.

reason_for_termination_suggestion.description: A suggested reason for why the user ended their session.

help_pages_visited.description: A list of URLs for help or documentation pages the user visited.

items.description: The URL of a help page.
